meta.sourcePolicy: Official HPA/JPA sources only. This file records 2023 event-level source candidates and must not auto-promote athlete histories into data/database.json.
notes: 2023 official-source candidate addendum for HPA Event Watch.
Keep separate from athlete master data, confirmed athlete histories, event entries, and research candidates.
The linked annual HPA result PDF is an event-level source locator; individual athlete rows require separate identity and row verification before promotion.

Source summary flags are aligned with newer event-index candidate files: 2023 currently has only annual official result PDF and venue/date evidence confirmed in this file; outline, entry roster, schedule, program,速報, and YouTube live sources remain unconfirmed.

events.name: 2023春の北海道パワーリフティング大会

sources.title: 2023年北海道協会大会結果PDF
sources.evidenceLines: PDF pages for 全日本高校パワーリフティング選手権大会 第7回北海道予選会 and 国民体育大会パワーリフティング公開競技 第9回北海道代表選考会 state 2023年5月13日, 会場 江別総合体育館 柔剣道場.

promotionGuardrails: Use this entry only as an official event source locator.
Do not promote athlete rows into confirmed histories without matching athlete identity, category/class, event date, and PDF row.
Record marks in the PDF require separate北海道記録/JPA verification before summarizing as record-holder achievements.
